rows.plan: Operator message reaches an executing agent reliably and quickly
rows.fact: Telegram -> Cloudflare Worker -> claude.yml proven live (BEM-947). Single fully-proven runtime path.
rows.gap: None for this path. Other paths (governance chain) are not yet equally proven.

rows.plan: object_runner -> dispatch_queue -> dispatch_consumer -> curator_router -> dispatch_executor: route by role/provider with fallback policy, honest planned/dispatched/executed states
rows.fact: All components exist as real code (not stubs): object_runner.py, dispatch_consumer.py, curator_router.py, dispatch_executor.py + dispatch_executor_guard.py. dispatch_executor.py repaired after NameError bug (BEM-948), now makes real HTTP calls to GitHub Actions API, writes to dispatch_executed.jsonl.
rows.gap: No live end-to-end trace proving object_runner-triggered task reaches executed/completed automatically without manual bridge.

rows.plan: Single universal queue-driven dispatcher reads ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, dispatches next PENDING task workflow, independent of which protocol/stage is queued
rows.fact: roadmap-autopilot.yml exists, functional: reads ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, makes direct curl HTTP dispatch to GitHub Actions API (independent of dispatch_executor.py).
rows.gap: Does not write to dispatch_executed.jsonl. Its dispatch evidence is not unified with the governance-chain evidence trail. (BEM-007 decision: unify journal, not code.)

rows.plan: prompt_assembler.py composes static role prompt + dynamic rule refs (rule_registry.json) per element_prompt_profiles.json, replacing hardcoded stage-runner prompts
rows.fact: scripts/prompt_assembler.py exists, real implementation. governance/registry/element_prompt_profiles.json exists with 10 profiles. governance/registry/rule_registry.json exists with RULE.SYSTEM.COUNCIL_ANALYST/AUDITOR/CURATOR_CANON present and properly cross-referenced.
rows.gap: Wired correctly at config level; no runtime trace proving *_stage_runner.py actually calls prompt_assembler.py during a live task instead of legacy hardcoded prompts.

rows.gap: RULE-004..010 enforcement code existence not individually re-verified after BEM-950 changes.

rows.plan: 8-stage roadmap P0.5->P7 to reach a working, evidence-backed control contour
rows.fact: 6/8 DONE (P0.5, P2, P3-limited, P5, P6, plus P4 skipped by operator decision). P7 receipt already exists with status BLOCKED.
rows.gap: P1 (CI-STABILIZE) blocked: no run-level evidence. P1-ALT-UNBLOCK attempt 1/3 failed (validator_did_not_create_receipt). P7 cannot pass until P1 resolved and P2/P3 receipts upgraded from OBSERVED/LIMITED_SCOPE to clean PASS.
